quest_urfs_champion: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Quest: Urf's Champion is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
multishot: QUEST: Hit enemy Champions with your chosen ability the required number of times. REWARD: Fire additional missiles per Quest Level.
courage_of_the_colossus: Immobilizing or grounding an enemy champion grants a shield for 3 seconds that absorbs 100 to 300 (+ 5% maximum health) damage (5 second cooldown per cast instance). Shields can stack between multiple triggers of this effect, though not refreshing the duration of previous shields.
quickstep: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Quickstep is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
scopiest_weapons: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Scopiest Weapons is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
jeweled_gauntlet: Katarina's ult counts as a high-frequency channeled DPS ability and triggers on-hit. Pair with Kraken Slayer, Bloodthirster/Bork, and Jeweled Gauntlet + Vulnerable for the highest single-second DPS in the game. Every dagger thrown during her spin triggers a 7.17x damage multiplier.
empyrean_promise: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Empyrean Promise is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
protein_shake: Alistar's Q is group CC and procs Colossus multiple times for an instantly huge shield — high haste means frequent Q, basically unkillable. Build full tank; Colossus has 5s CD, so dump full combo each fight, then Q to proc Colossus — bigger shield per enemy hit.
chain_reaction: If a target Knocked Back by your chosen ability hits another champion, they are Knocked Up and dealt damage. When colliding with terrain, the Knock Up duration is extended and they are dealt bonus damage.
poro_stampede: QUEST: Gather Poro Snax and feed the required number of Poros. REWARD: Gain the Poro Charge Summoner Spell, which launches waves of Poros at the enemy team. Additional waves unlock per Quest Level. "Oho! Look how charming they are!" — Poro Herder
ok_boomerang: Automatically cast Boomerang Blade at the closest nearby enemy champion within 1250 units, dealing 40 to 200 (+ 30% bonus AD) (+ 20% AP) adaptive damage to enemies hit (10 second cooldown).
pursuit_of_power: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Pursuit of Power is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
lil_extra_help: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Lil' Extra Help is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
pursuit_of_haste: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Pursuit of Haste is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
terror: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Terror is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
scopier_weapons: Based on S16 crit changes — Smolder's Q gains crit chance and crit damage. Build around Essence Reaver + Infinity Edge for huge % damage late. Currently weak early, so farm to 225 stacks safely; pick up defense if needed; with Jeweled Gauntlet etc., quality jumps massively.
warlock_juicebox: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Warlock Juicebox is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
from_downtown: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, From Downtown is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
void_dash: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Void Dash is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
soul_siphon: 80% of GP's damage comes from barrels (E), which the system treats as zero-MS enemy targets. When firing barrels, he gains MS and slows enemies, opening up a huge MS gap and locking E into its 40% damage cap. Post-explosion bonus MS keeps the gap up for sustained huge damage.
bread_and_cheese: Classic Fizz — one-shot low-HP enemies, then Zhonya's or Fey Magic E to bail. Fey Magic is the key tech; haste is your top priority for high uptime.
bread_and_jam: AP build amps Twitch's passive true damage and E burst; W's huge slow locks enemies down. Slows don't stack — no Rylai's. Twitch's passive can't proc Liandry's or Ethereal Weapon — don't pick those.
bread_and_butter: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Bread And Butter is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
scoped_weapons: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Scoped Weapons is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
support_main: QUEST: Heal allied champions for the required number of Health. REWARD: Any healing you provide now also Heals Over Time after the initial heal.
twin_fire: Damaging abilities launch 1 (+ 1 per 33.33% critical strike chance) firecracker missiles at the target that each deal 10 to 30 (+ 7% bonus AD) (+ 7% AP) magic damage (5 second cooldown). Additionally, gain 15% critical strike chance.
witchful_thinking: When selecting augments in ARAM: Mayhem, Witchful Thinking is particularly effective on champions that can maximize its benefits.
mighty_shield: Doubles crit chance via passive — Ruined King alone takes you near max crit. Yasuo's high-frequency Q and E refresh shields constantly, while Death's Dance bleed makes him both tanky and bursty.
juiced: Stack the Archmage hex, then loop Qiyana W (resets Q + adds an element) with Archmage's CDR returns for infinite QW combos. At 100+ ability haste it becomes a perfect cycle — endless dashes, stealth, or CC. Manamune is critical since infinite QW drains mana fast.
zealot: Kayle's ascended passive bonus fire makes autos count as two hits, so Master of Duality stacks both AD and AP at once. W heals scale massively with AP, and Kayle scales into a god — half-tank for survival. Survive long enough to ramp, then take over.
